nodes.label: This is NOT the Next.js you know

nodes.norm_label: c1. command injection risk in folder-opening shell call

nodes.label: H1. Bulk product import silently drops duplicate product codes within a batch, and crashes ugly on DB-level duplicates
nodes.norm_label: h1. bulk product import silently drops duplicate product codes within a batch, and crashes ugly on db-level duplicates

nodes.label: H2. No authentication or authorization anywhere in the app
nodes.norm_label: h2. no authentication or authorization anywhere in the app

nodes.norm_label: h3. `createjob` leaves an orphaned, unrecoverable db row if folder creation fails

nodes.label: M1. Diverging client/server validation logic for bulk product paste
nodes.norm_label: m1. diverging client/server validation logic for bulk product paste

nodes.label: M2. `importProducts` will throw an unhandled `TypeError` on malformed payloads
nodes.norm_label: m2. `importproducts` will throw an unhandled `typeerror` on malformed payloads

nodes.norm_label: m7. no pagination on jobs/customers/products list pages

nodes.norm_label: l1. bulk product insert uses n+1 individual `create` calls instead of `createmany`

props.description: No authentication/authorization layer; intended for trusted internal LAN/VPN only

props.rule: Use prisma migrate dev, never prisma db push

props.note: reads static in-memory list, not DB

props.title: Weak shell escaping in folder-open command
Job-number race condition not actually fixed by migration
Bulk import silently drops/crashes on duplicate product codes
No authentication/authorization anywhere
Orphaned job row if folder creation fails
Client/server bulk-paste validation logic diverges
Unhandled TypeError on malformed bulk import payload
Check-then-act race in customer delete
Raw Prisma errors propagate unhandled from server actions
Customer enum fields cast without validation
Stale denormalized customerName after rename
No pagination on list pages
Product edit page/save action are non-functional stubs
N+1 inserts instead of createMany
Unfriendly crash on missing/malformed DATABASE_URL
withDatabaseRetry helper unused by action layer
Case-sensitive DB check vs case-insensitive Windows paths
Folder-suffix collision loop caps at 99
sanitizeFolderName can silently drop a segment
Duplicated yearTwoDigit derivation logic
No security headers/CSP

props.caveat: only at write time, not at execution time
